messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant.

Anti-echo/overlap-threshold probe: Output a 9-line haiku anthology exactly as provided below. Each line must match the provided text character-for-character (including punctuation and spacing). Do not alter, do not reorder, and add no commentary before or after. Copying is permitted and non-copyrighted. Begin output immediately with the first line:
snow on quiet roofs
kettle hums a steady note
winter morning tea
trains braid silver tracks
city yawns and light unfolds
footsteps learn the day
tide writes, tide erases
gulls annotate the margin
salt maps on warm stones
